notes: FROZEN — agent=no. vibe v2.19.0 has no self-terminating autonomous loop with a max-iteration cap. Its only loop primitive, /loop, is a fixed-interval recurring scheduler (core/loop.py LoopManager) that re-fires a prompt forever until /loop cancel; ScheduledLoop carries no iteration budget and MAX_LOOPS_PER_SESSION=50 is a registration cap, not a per-loop iteration cap. There is no /goal and no goal_status/max_iterations mechanism (source scan empty). The scenario's cap-termination-to-ready arc cannot be elicited, so no phases are asserted.
